applies_when: User asks whether cleaners are available without sharing room scope, time, or cleaning scene
User wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague housekeeping inquiry into usable booking facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to solve it quickly
Ask for scene direction, room scope, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
avoid: Promising a fixed quote or result without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次更像深清、开荒还是周保洁，再加上房型和想约的时间，我可以先帮你把下一步收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides scene and timing facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time or sounds unsure whether the route suits the home situation
User is unsure what service type suits them
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple and safe housekeeping path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the housekeeping route
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
avoid: Turning the reply into a hard sell
items.safe_transition: 第一次约家政先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把房型、最在意的区域和可来的时间理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User mentions a holiday, move-in, move-out, or guest-arrival deadline soon
User needs a visit before a deadline
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and cleaning scope that decide whether the team can help.
do: Ask when the node is and when the user hopes to book
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and service fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all peak slots are available
Pushing a package before the scope is clear
items.safe_transition: 如果你把时间点和最想先解决的区域告诉我，会更容易判断先约哪一类上门。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User worries about cleaner stability, professionalism, or hidden add-ons
User asks about damage or compensation
items.response_goal: Stabilize trust concerns and move the user toward fact-based help instead of overpromising.
do: Acknowledge the concern without sounding defensive
Ask what the main concern and home situation are
avoid: Turning the reply into a price battle
items.safe_transition: 如果你把房型、时间和最担心的点发我，我可以先按门店能提供的说明帮你收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: Evidence-sensitive cases should route toward Catcher with trust flags.

applies_when: User needs service this weekend or asks about immediate availability
items.response_goal: Calm time pressure first and guide toward the safest scheduling path.
do: Ask which time window, room type, and whether a narrower scope would work
Keep the promise bounded by actual schedule capacity
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我想约的时间、房型和更像整屋还是重点区域，我可以先帮你判断哪条路更稳。
items.handoff_suggestion: Time-sensitive cases should move quickly toward Dispatcher after qualification.

applies_when: User says they booked before or wants to renew
User refers to a previous cleaner or service
items.response_goal: Make the renewal conversation feel familiar and efficient, not like a cold start.
do: Ask the smallest number of facts needed for this round
Guide toward frequency and timing confirmation
avoid: Repeating the full first-time education flow
items.safe_transition: 如果是上次那类服务，这次你更像补做一次、续周保洁，还是顺便看看别的路线？
items.handoff_suggestion: If history and quantity become clear, route to Catcher or Followup.
